creator: mircx123@gmail.com
text:
Hello i will try configure inspircd with a load module geoip and again i get error please i happy if do you can give to me a type how i can configure i will try to do it and but is not work
./configure --prefix=/usr/local/libexec/inspircd  --config-dir=/usr/local/libexec/inspircd --enable-kqueue --disable-interactive  --module-dir=/usr/local/libexec/inspircd/modules/m_geoip.so  --binary-dir=bin --with-cc=c++ --log-dir=INSPIRCD_LOGDIR  --data-dir= --uid=INSPIRCD_UID --enable-gnutls --enable-geoip
